baseSummary: Applied AI Developer with hands-on experience building LLM-powered applications, RAG pipelines, and workflow-driven AI systems. Skilled in designing tool-calling agents, integrating APIs, and automating processes using tools like n8n. Experienced in optimizing latency and API usage while developing scalable AI features across NLP and generative AI use cases, with practical deployment using Python, Hugging Face, and Docker.

education.degree: Post Graduate Diploma in Big Data Analytics
education.details: Generative AI, Deep Learning, NLP, Distributed Systems, PyTorch, Hugging Face
Signal Processing, Embedded Systems, Data Structures, Programming

certifications.name: Post Graduate Diploma in Big Data Analytics

experience.title: AI Development & Research Intern
bullets: Developed OpenClaw agent skills using Python, enabling automated IDE operations, GitHub workflows, and memory-aware context handling; implemented context pruning strategies to reduce LLM token usage and improve response consistency.

Designed and deployed an AI-driven lead generation pipeline with CRM-style automation, integrating multi-stage inference workflows (text-to-speech, summarization, translation) to streamline outreach and enhance output relevance.

Built and integrated a multilingual LLM-based chatbot into a proprietary CMS using REST APIs; optimized model performance using Hugging Face and Ollama (INT4 quantization), reducing model size and improving deployment efficiency.

experience.title: AI & Deep Learning Intern
bullets: Deployed production-grade GenAI fine-tuning pipelines using PyTorch, Hugging Face, and Docker, reducing model training iteration time by 30% and establishing scalable NLP deployment architecture.

Engineered TapVision TTS web app using Streamlit, gTTS, and MarianMT, integrating voice commands, translation, and summarisation — improving model update efficiency by 40% via modular backend architecture.

Launched real-time Sentiment Analysis pipeline using MLlib, Twitter API, and Python, detecting social emotion trends across live data and delivering summarised insights with 85% classification accuracy.
